accuracy_notice.warning: Tibetan Wylie transliteration may NOT match scholarly standard
accuracy_notice.recommendation: Verify against Bon Kangyur and Tibetological standards
scholarly_sources: Karmay, S.G. (1972). The Ordinance of lHa Blama Ye-shes-'od. THL.
Snellgrove, D.L. (1967). The Nine Ways of Bon. Oxford University Press.

digital_editions: https://bon.org/ (Foundation for the Preservation of Bon Tradition)
accuracy_notice.living_tradition_notice: Bon is a living tradition - consult Bon lamas and FPBT
